creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text: Currently net-mgmt/virt-viewer compiles without spice protocol support. Since we have deskutils/spice-gtk in ports tree I think it could be build with libspice-client-gtk-3.0.so and libspice-client-glib-2.0.so but removing --without-spice-gtk in Makefile dont help.
